title: Skyblock Chat Notifier
description: Adds a simple way to get a title triggered on your screen triggered by a chat message!
body:
## Skyblock Chat Notifier
A simple mod that lets you create titles triggered by chat messages.

**Usage**
1. Simply add a trigger (make sure it matches the exact text shown in chat except for colors)
2. See title on your screen whenever that text shows up in chat!

---

![Settings UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64a2017e09b78d3f257642b4ac1129937204c0c0_0.webp)
*Example (Whenever the text "Trigger text" appears in chat "Message on screen" would appear in the center of the screen)*
